title: VetVisit AI: AI veterinary scribe for faster, better medical records | Product Hunt
excerpt: VetVisit AI listens during veterinary consultations and turns them into structured SOAP notes, dental records, surgical reports, and client discharge instructions in seconds. Choose from 29 templates or create your own, then copy the note into any PIMS.
content_html: VetVisit AI listens during veterinary consultations and turns them into structured SOAP notes, dental records, surgical reports, and client discharge instructions in seconds. Choose from 29 templates or create your own, then copy the note into any PIMS.
content_text: VetVisit AI listens during veterinary consultations and turns them into structured SOAP notes, dental records, surgical reports, and client discharge instructions in seconds. Choose from 29 templates or create your own, then copy the note into any PIMS.

blocks.html_en: VetVisit AI listens during veterinary consultations and turns them into structured SOAP notes, dental records, surgical reports, and client discharge instructions in seconds. Choose from 29 templates or create your own, then copy the note into any PIMS.

sentences.en: VetVisit AI listens during veterinary consultations and turns them into structured SOAP notes, dental records, surgical reports, and client discharge instructions in seconds.
sentences.zh: VetVisit AI 在兽医咨询期间进行聆听，并在几秒钟内将其转化为结构化的 SOAP 记录、牙科记录、手术报告和客户出院说明。

sentences.en: Choose from 29 templates or create your own, then copy the note into any PIMS.
sentences.zh: 从 29 个模板中进行选择或创建您自己的模板，然后将注释复制到任何 PIMS 中。

content_html_zh: VetVisit AI 在兽医咨询期间进行聆听，并在几秒钟内将其转化为结构化的 SOAP 记录、牙科记录、手术报告和客户出院说明。 从 29 个模板中进行选择或创建您自己的模板，然后将注释复制到任何 PIMS 中。
